    ActiveCell

    Gets active cell

    Gets active line terminator

    Gets active line terminator scale

    Gets active point
    AxisLockAngel

    Gets axis lock angel
    AxisLockOrigin

    Gets axis lock origin
    Is3D

    Gets key point snap divisor
    KeyPointSnapFlag

    OriginPoint

    Gets global origin point
    Scale
